queries.question: Show me the chapters corresponding to each text book.
queries.sql: SELECT Chapters.chapter_name  from Textbook_Chapters join Chapters on Textbook_Chapters.chapter_id = Chapters.chapter_id join Textbooks on Textbook_Chapters.textbook_id = Textbooks.id   GROUP BY Textbook_Chapters.chapter_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Textbook_Chapters.textbook_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Textbooks)

queries.question: Show me the chapters corresponding to each text book.
queries.sql: select textbooks.title , chapters.chapter_name from Textbook_Chapters join Chapters on Textbook_Chapters.chapter_id = Chapters.chapter_id join Textbooks on Textbook_Chapters.textbook_id = Textbooks.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?chapter_name WHERE {
  ?textbook_chapters a :Textbook_Chapters .
  ?chapters a :Chapters .
  ?textbook_chapters p:hasChapters ?chapters .
  ?textbooks a :Textbooks .
  ?textbook_chapters p:hasTextbooks ?textbooks .
  ?textbooks p:title ?title .
  ?chapters p:chapter_name ?chapter_name .
}
